pages.text:
1. Find the equation of the line
a) Find the equation of the line passing through the points
( 2 , 3 )
and
( 6 , 7 )
b) Find the equation of the line passing through the points
(-3 ,-1 )
and
( 5 , 3 )
2. Generate 10 points from an equation
a) The equation of a line is
y=2 x+1 .
. List 10 points that lie on this line.
b} The equation of a line is
y=-{\frac{3} {2}} x+4 .
_ List 10 points that satisfy this equation.
a) The line passes through
( 3 , 5 )
and
( 7 , 9 )
3. Find points from the equation of a line passing through two given points
. Write the equation of the line and find 3 other
points in the line.
b) The line passes through
(-1 , 2 )
and (4,3). Write the equation of the line and find
3 ~
other
points in the line.
